current_visible_copy: Audiobook held for QA (reported live production stale copy)
expected_copy: Audiobook available; section-following narration available from the reader when manifest evidence passes

diagnosis.root_cause: /books/{slug} exposes audiobook_enabled without enough release/QA/asset evidence; BookDetail did not enrich from reader manifest, and audioReleaseSafety ignored manifest.audio.url as an audio asset.
diagnosis.cache_invalidation_required: production deploy/cache refresh required after merge; source branch does not mutate live bundle

fixed_behavior.unapproved_bengali_copy: Reader edition available. Audio will appear only after narration, sync, and browser gates pass.
